---
title: 'Heritage of Faith Church - Crowley, TX'
date: '2012-05-24T05:08:00.0030000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Church Finder'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '5688140685202974755'
blogger_filename: '/2012/05/heritage-of-faith-church-crowley-tx.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Church Finder/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Texas'
---

Heritage of Faith Church<br />
Founding Pastor - Jerry and Carolyn Savelle<br />
Senior Pastors - Justin and Annette Bridges<br />
<br />
<a href="http://www.heritageoffaith.com/">http://www.heritageoffaith.com/</a>
<br />
<br />
Heritage of Faith Christian Center<br />
10350 Old Cleburne Crowley Jct.
Crowley TX 76036
<br />
<br />
Heritage of Faith is a multi-cultural church that was established to bring about a winning life to every person in our community. Our purpose is found in this statement “Together We Are Reaching for a Winning Life”. In this, we find that winning is a constant pursuit of not only God but His Word. It is also coming to the realization that it’s a never ending decision to not give up or let go of the life that we have found in Christ.<br />
<br />
<br />
